title: ixora korthalsii
intro: Ixora korthalsii, also known as the flame of the woods or ixora, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. Its leaves and flowers are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Ixora korthalsii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices to harness its medicinal properties.
